channel.title: Amd on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Amd on jamesm.blog

item.title: AI Hardware Wars 2026: Blackwell, MI300X, and TPUv6
item.description: The 2026 AI accelerator landscape is a real three-horse race for the first time. A practical look at NVIDIA Blackwell, AMD's MI300X, and Google's TPUv6 - what each is actually good for, where the software stacks have caught up, and what it means for buyers.
